title: chaenactis cusickii
intro: Chaenactis cusickii, also known as Cusick's desert marigold, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family. It is native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Chaenactis cusickii can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin conditions and respiratory issues, and it is also used as a natural remedy to boost the immune system.
